lyrics.text: Another sunrise, another sunset
lyrics.translation: 又是一次日出，又是一次日落

lyrics.text: Soon it'll all be yesterday
lyrics.translation: 转瞬间都将变为昨天

lyrics.text: Another good day, another bad day,
lyrics.translation: 美好的一天，糟糕的一天

lyrics.text: What did you do today?
lyrics.translation: 你又是如何看待今天

lyrics.text: Why do we choose to chase what we'll lose?
lyrics.translation: 为什么我们不断苛求一些我们终将失去的东西

lyrics.text: What you want isn't what you have.
lyrics.translation: 你所有拥有的未必是你所想要的

lyrics.text: What you have may not be yours, to keep.
lyrics.translation: 一些你已拥有的也许不属于你的

lyrics.text: If I could find love, at a stop, in a park with open arms,
lyrics.translation: 如果我能在一个车站，亦或在一座公园张开双臂发现真爱

lyrics.text: I would save all my love, in a jar,
lyrics.translation: 我会将我所有的爱

lyrics.text: made of sparks, sealed in my beating heart,
lyrics.translation: 存在这个蜜罐，然后封印在我跳动的心里

lyrics.text: Could it be yours to keep, the Jar of Love.
lyrics.translation: 你会珍藏这满载着爱的蜜罐里吗

lyrics.text: Another left turn, another head turns
lyrics.translation: 下一个左转，下一个路口

lyrics.text: Could he be someone I deserve?
lyrics.translation: 他会是我的真命天子吗

lyrics.text: Another right turn, another lesson learned
lyrics.translation: 下一个右转，又一次教训

lyrics.text: Never leave an open flame to burn
lyrics.translation: 不要放任这热情的火燃烧
